title: Minecraft: Classic Edition
description: A resource pack that aims to bring back the classic feel of Minecraft
body:
![logo](https://i.imgur.com/AdzNeq7.png)

**Minecraft: Classic Edition** is a resource pack that aims to bring the feel of Minecraft's older versions to the most recent ones.

---
[![banner](https://i.imgur.com/Ltg5H6Y.png)](https://shorturl.at/JQN9W)

## Vanilla

The vanilla version of the pack is a curated mixture of some of my own textures, **monsterfart77**'s / **InfiniteVoid**'s [**Classic Alternative pack**](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/classic-alternative/), **ic22487**'s [**Programmer Art Ultimate pack**](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/programmer-art-ultimate-1-17/) and **Sencie's** [**Old Lighting & Water**](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/old-lighting-amp-old-water/) pack. It also includes **UsernameGeri**'s [**Classic Menu Panorama**](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/classic-menu-panorama-accurate/) and **tosutosu**'s [**Old Minecraft logo**](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/old-minecraft-logo-but-hd-for-1-20/)

![example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6r6dKiPb/images/2bf3c0c916fb15a6fad63b86b7a617bb973860e8.png)

## Mod Support

All releases of the vanilla pack have an optional ZIP file that contains all the resource packs for the currently supported mods, one for each mod.

![example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6r6dKiPb/images/82d66841f4cfda1367951bb188b0a8689b576f8c.png)

### List of currently supported mods:

- [The Aether](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether)
- [Better End](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterend)
- [Better Nether](https://modrinth.com/mod/betternether)
- [Biomes O' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty)
- [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)
- [Ecologics](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ecologics)
- [Expanded Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/expanded-delight)
- [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight)
- [MCA Reborn](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-comes-alive-reborn)
- [Let's Do: Meadow](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-cheese)
- [Mythic Upgrades](https://modrinth.com/mod/mythic-upgrades)
- [Regions Unexplored](https://modrinth.com/mod/regions-unexplored)
- [Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries)
- [Twigs](https://modrinth.com/mod/twigs)
- [Let's Do: Vinery](https://modrinth.com/mod/vinery)
